violations.text: Cheese was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025
The door to the toilet room is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2024
Establishment is lacking an outdoor receptacle or dumpster. Per interview with PIC, dumpster will be shared until dumpster is delivered. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2024
